import React from "react"; const NutritionInfo = () => { return (
{/* HERO SECTION */}
{/* Glass Title Box */}

Nutrition Information

Explore calories, macros, micronutrients & more

{/* MAIN CONTENT */}
{/* THREE INFO CARDS */}
{/* CALORIES CARD */}

🔥 Calories

Calories supply energy for daily activities. Managing your intake helps improve weight control, energy and overall health.

{/* MACROS CARD */}

🍽 Macros

  • • Proteins → muscle repair & growth
  • • Carbs → primary energy source
  • • Fats → hormone production & brain health
{/* MICROS CARD */}

🧪 Micronutrients

Vitamins & minerals support immunity, metabolism, bone strength and cellular repair.

{/* FOOD TABLE SECTION */}

🍎 Nutrition Breakdown of Common Foods

{/* Food Table image (glass frame) */}
{/* TABLE */}
{[ ["Apple (1 medium)", 95, "0.5g", "25g", "0.3g"], ["Banana (1 medium)", 105, "1.3g", "27g", "0.4g"], ["Chicken (100g)", 165, "31g", "0g", "3.6g"], ["Rice (1 cup)", 206, "4.3g", "45g", "0.4g"], ["Almonds (10 pcs)", 70, "2.6g", "2.5g", "6g"], ].map(([food, cal, p, c, f], i) => ( ))}

); }; export default NutritionInfo;
